speaker: internal
text: Crescent Family Medicine this is Diana.

speaker: external
text: Hi Diana this is Eleanor Park. I'm a patient of Dr. Reese. I'm having some chest tightness and I'm not sure what to do.

speaker: internal
text: Eleanor can you tell me how long this has been going on?

speaker: external
text: Maybe an hour. It's not severe but it doesn't feel right. I took an aspirin already.

speaker: internal
text: Okay. Are you having any shortness of breath dizziness or pain radiating to your arm or jaw?

speaker: external
text: A little bit of shortness of breath. No arm pain.

speaker: internal
text: I want you to hang up and call 911 right now. We can pull your chart on our end but you should be evaluated immediately. Don't drive yourself.

speaker: external
text: Okay. Okay I'll call them now.

speaker: internal
text: I'm going to call back in thirty minutes to check on you and I'll let Dr. Reese know.
